name: Memory Wiki
description: Personal knowledge wiki with raw backlog, compiled pages, typed cross-references, and three-tier lint. Dump notes and sources into raw, sync to compile into an interlinked wiki. Browse, search, and query your knowledge base.
author: ultralight

search.description: Search wiki pages and raw sources by keyword. Returns matched pages and unsynced sources separately with snippets.

wiki_id.description: Wiki name or ID. Defaults to Personal wiki.

returns.description: { pages: [{id, title, slug, page_type, snippet}], sources: [{id, title, classification, snippet}] }

query.description: Ask a question against your wiki. Synthesizes an answer from relevant pages using AI, with optional save back to wiki as a new synthesis page.

question.description: Question to answer from wiki knowledge

wiki_id.description: Wiki name or ID. Defaults to Personal wiki.

save.description: Save the synthesized answer as a new wiki page. Defaults to false.

browse.description: Navigate wiki structure. View a specific page with its linked pages, filter by type, search, or get an overview with page counts and recent pages.

wiki_id.description: Wiki name or ID. Defaults to Personal wiki.

page_type.description: Filter by page type: person, decision, commitment, deadline, concept, preference, app_catalog, comparison, synthesis

page_id.description: View a specific page by ID — returns full content plus all linked pages

ingest.description: Add raw content to the wiki backlog. Fast — no AI processing. Content is queued for compilation during sync.

wiki_id.description: Wiki name or ID. Defaults to Personal wiki.

source_type.description: Type: note, article, bookmark, conversation, app_output. Default: note

classification.description: Classification: synthesis, preference, observation, bookmark, app_output, general. Default: general

sync.description: Compile unsynced raw sources into wiki pages using AI. Extracts typed entities (people, decisions, commitments, deadlines, concepts), creates or updates pages, establishes cross-references, and runs structural lint.

wiki_id.description: Wiki name or ID. Defaults to Personal wiki.

lint.description: Health-check the wiki. Quick: structural checks (orphans, broken links, stale pages). Standard: adds AI contradiction detection. Deep: adds AI gap analysis for missing topics.

wiki_id.description: Wiki name or ID. Defaults to Personal wiki.

depth.description: Lint depth: quick (default), standard, or deep

returns.description: { issues: [{severity, type, message, page_slug?}], stats: {pages, sources_unsynced, links} }

update_page.description: Edit a wiki page directly. Updates content, title, or type. Re-syncs cross-reference links if content changes.

create_wiki.description: Create a new wiki (beyond the default Personal wiki). Useful for separate knowledge domains or shared team wikis.

widget_wiki_browser_ui.description: DO NOT call this function directly. To show the wiki browser widget, include {{widget:wiki_browser:APP_ID}} in your response.

widget_wiki_browser_data.description: Internal widget data function — do not call directly.
